content.en:
Airplanes!!!!!

Ye Tian quickly succeeded in copying the body of the Spirit Realm God, but with this cultivation alone, he would definitely not be able to help Tianhe Dao Mountain.

Therefore, he had to elevate the cultivation of this replica body.

Since this Eternal Dao Seed that copied the body was not powerful, it was relatively easy to raise the Eternal Dao Seed of this Replicating Body to the limit, but it was a little difficult to condense the fifth Eternal Realm Spirit, and the success rate would be very low.

But with him, the success rate is not a problem at all.

Thereupon.

In the following years, Ye Tian prepared a lot of resources to improve this Eternal Dao Seed that copied his body, even if it was a resource with huge side effects, he used all of them, even if it would lead to the aggravation of the Eternal Dao Seed problem, he would not care.

After all, this is not his body at all, and if it is scrapped, it will be scrapped, and he doesn't care at all.

After a period of time, Ye Tian raised the Eternal Dao Seed to a similar level, although he had not yet reached the limit, he was unwilling to continue to improve, and was ready to directly cultivate a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Method to condense the fourth Eternal Realm Spirit.

Of course.

This time, the method of the Eternal Realm Spirit he condensed was the Eternal Realm Spirit that he had never cultivated, the Tianyan Giant Ape Realm Spirit, and once this perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit was condensed, it would be of great help to the combat power.

Therefore, Ye Tian chose this method of eternal realm spiritual inheritance.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to condense the fourth Eternal Realm Spirit.

There is no doubt that in the first impact, Ye Tian failed, and even caused this replica body to directly demonize, and committed suicide directly at the critical moment.

Then, he continued to copy the body of the Spirit Realm God and began the second impact.

In this way, again and again, failure after failure, and impact again and again.

He had a chance, so he didn't care at all.

Finally, after thirty-six attempts, he finally made the Spirit Realm God copy body break through, condensing five Eternal Realm Spirits, and the fifth Eternal Realm Spirit was a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, with a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Technique-Tianyan Ape Strike Technique!

"The spirit product realm god has copied the body, and his current combat power is not bad, and he also has a perfect eternal realm spirit and a perfect eternal realm spirit technique, even if he has just broken through, his combat power should still be a little more powerful than the three eternal realm gods who condense five eternal realm spirits in Tianhe Dao Mountain. Ye Tian estimated.

Under normal circumstances, his spiritual product realm god copy body would definitely not be able to defeat the three realm gods of Tianhe Dao Mountain, not to mention that there are many realm gods in Tianhe Dao Mountain, and there are many middle-level realm gods in the Eternal Realm God Realm alone.

Even if the other Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level Realm Gods who condensed the four Eternal Realm Spirits were inferior in combat power, they could still bring him a hint of threat if they could assist in the battle.

However, if he worked hard and directly burned the Eternal Dao Seed, he would really be able to kill many realm gods, even if he couldn't destroy Tianhe Dao Mountain, he could still make Tianhe Dao Mountain suffer heavy damage, so that Tianhe Dao Mountain would fall.

In the future, he will make another replica body to attack Tianhe Dao Mountain, and he can completely destroy Tianhe Dao Mountain.

......

The realm of the gods.

Mt. Tianhedao.

this day.

Ye Tian's Spirit Realm God Replica Body came here, and some of the Eternal Realm Treasures on his body were obtained from the Demon Seed, which was able to enhance some of his strength.

He will directly burn the origin of these Eternal Realm Treasures, and he does not plan to use them a second time, so he directly sacrifices these Eternal Realm Treasures in exchange for a little increase in strength.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian directly entered the Tianhe Dao Mountain, and then urged the Tianyan Giant Ape Realm Spirit, and a huge Tianyan Realm Spirit phantom appeared.

Immediately after, Ye Tian held an Eternal Realm Treasure Long Stick and smashed it towards Tianhe Dao Mountain with a fierce blow.

In an instant.

A territory directly collapsed and shattered, and a large number of Eternal Dao Realm, Half-Step Eternal Realm Gods, and a few Realm Gods didn't even have time to resist, and directly turned into ashes.

Thundered!!!!

Half of the Tianhe Dao Mountain had collapsed, and a large number of formations had been destroyed before they could be opened.

In the next moment, the formation opened.

But the good time to turn on has been missed.

Then.

The Heavenly Providence Realm God, the Liuhe Realm God, and the Vessel Armor Realm God, the three realm gods who had condensed the five eternal realm spirits, were all extremely angry.

"No, the Spirit Realm God didn't go to support the Eternal Realm last time, and he fell to the Eternal Realm, how could he be resurrected?"

"Maybe it's not the spirit realm god, maybe it's made by using some kind of change-like eternal realm treasure, but he doesn't want us to know his identity and besieges him!"

These three realm gods shot out together, and the other realm gods of the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm did not watch the show, and they also shot one after another.

With so many realm gods besieging him, Ye Tian was naturally not an opponent, but he didn't care about this replica body at all.

Boom!!!!

He burned the Eternal Dao Seed, burned all the Eternal Realm Treasures, squeezed the power of his own physical body, and surpassed the limit to urge the Heavenly Ape Attack Technique.

"'Kill!'"

He's completely desperate.

And the gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm were also stunned, and they were suppressed by Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian seized the moment when they didn't dare to fight hard, and hit the Liuhe Realm God with one blow, and then he desperately killed the Liuhe Realm God.

By the time they reacted, it was too late.

"God of the Heavenly Providence Realm, God of the Armor Realm, save me quickly!!"

The gods of the Liuhe realm shouted.

However.

Ye Tian's Tianyan Ape Attack Technique directly shattered the body of the Liuhe Realm God and smashed it to pieces.

At this point, the gods of the Liuhe Realm fell.

Ye Tian knew very well that his ability to kill the gods of the Liuhe Realm was already the limit, his body could not last too long, and his injuries were not light.

Thereupon.

He did his best to kill more Eternal Realm Gods, Middle-Order Realm Gods, and Ordinary Realm Gods.

In this way, it will be able to cause greater damage to Tianhe Dao Mountain.

Thundered!!!!

One realm god after another was killed by Ye Tian, and the palaces of Tianhe Dao Mountain (Wang Haozhao) were destroyed by Ye Tian's attack, and even the treasure house was torn apart.

Not long after, Ye Tian's body finally couldn't hold on, and then in the way of self-preservation of the Eternal Dao Species, he broke out the final blow, directly hitting the Dish Armor Realm God, lightly injuring the Heavenly Providence Realm God, and taking away the lives of the three Realm Gods.

... Blow...

Tianhe Dao Mountain has become a ruin at this moment.

The gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm and the hard-hit Vessel Armor Realm gods didn't know what was going on at all, and they were still a little confused until now.

They didn't know why this dead Spirit Realm God wanted to attack Tianhe Dao Mountain, the other party was definitely not a real Spirit Realm God, but even if it was fake, there was no need to sacrifice himself to severely damage Tianhe Dao Mountain.

Unless it is a possibility, that is, the other party is going to turn into a demon, and take advantage of the last opportunity to severely damage Tianhe Dao Mountain, which is possible.

But the Eternal Realm Spirit urged by the other party was too unfamiliar, and they had never seen it before!
